name: Wreck of the Grey Gull
description: A great three-masted ship lies broken across the rocks, its hull cracked open like a rib cage and its rigging trailing in the surf. The name Grey Gull is just legible under a crust of barnacles. Drowned things shelter in the shadow of the wreck, and the whole scene stinks of brine and rot. A ruined tower stands to the west; the driftwood path runs back south.
ambient_messages: Torn rigging creaks and slaps against the broken hull.
The surf sucks and gurgles through a hole in the ship's shattered side.
Something heavy shifts deep inside the wreck, then goes still.
